facts.fact: The dbt event pipeline has been silently dropping between 2% and 3% of raw events since 2023-12-15 due to a schema mismatch in the Kafka consumer; affected tables show inflated uptime metrics
The ML feature store contains 14 stale feature sets from the abandoned personalization project; they have not been deprecated and will be consumed by any new personalization work
The GDPR deletion job has a backlog of 847 pending deletion requests older than 30 days, exceeding the legally required 30-day SLA
Snowflake compute costs exceeded the monthly budget by 34% in January due to a full-table scan in the attribution model introduced in the December release
